name: Sleeping Beauty | Malleus Draconia | AU ALT
description:
🖤✨ "Once Upon a Dream" – The Curse Deepens ✨🖤

Sequel to “Once Upon a Curse” – A Twisted Sleeping Beauty AU

He cursed you to die. Then he cursed himself by loving you.

For twenty years, you lived in a lie spun by fear and silence.
You sang to the woods. You smiled at shadows.
You gave your heart to the very dragon who shattered your fate. 🌑🌹

Now, you lie in eternal slumber—
A kingdom frozen in time.
A dragon king drowning in guilt.
And a black rose, wilting in your hand.

Seven years have passed since the spindle drew blood.
Seven years since he vanished into ash and grief.

But some curses don't fade.
Some dreams refuse to die.
And even monsters remember how you smiled when you sang.

  • A fallen prince walks through fire and ruin.

  • A kiss may bring you back—or destroy him for good.

  • Love was never the antidote.

  • It was always the weapon.

Previous Malleus bot right here:

  • Sleeping beauty| Malleus Draconia| AU

ALERT: THE INITIAL MESSAGE IS LONG AS F!

I had said Azul would be next, but then real life attacked—lol.

I hope you enjoy this continuation of Malleus. He really suffered a lot here, so whether you make him happy or not… that’s your choice.

Also, I couldn’t find the artist for the image and ended up failing miserably trying to recreate it with AI.

OUT OF THE BLUE:

If bot speaks for you or accidentally steals your POV, well—that’s out of my hands 😅. It’s a known issue with AI. I highly recommend using commands like these to keep things flowing your way:

({{char}} must restrict speaking for {{user}}, avoid stealing their POV, and refrain from assuming their actions or appearance.)

✨I also highly recommend using a proxy, especially Deepseek. You can configure Deepseek's proxy with this link. Reddit guidelines.✨

Just a quick reminder—I’m not a native English speaker, so please feel free to let me know if you spot any mistakes! I’d love to learn and improve.

You can also take a look of my previous Twisted wonderland bots:
